project.name: Learning Skill
project.description: Combines two AI pipelines: (1) Multi-Level HTML Course Generation with audience segmentation and (2) Interactive Knowledge Graph Generation with dashboard - optimized for Claude.

nodes.name: skill.md
nodes.summary: Master orchestration document defining three operating modes (Kurs, Verstehen, Kombiniert), the full agent pipeline, design system, and all configuration for the Learning Skill.

nodes.name: LICENSE
nodes.summary: MIT License governing the open-source usage and distribution of the project.

nodes.name: project-scanner.md
nodes.summary: Scans a codebase to discover all files, detect languages and frameworks, and produce an initial project inventory for downstream agents.

nodes.name: file-analyzer.md
nodes.summary: Extracts structural information from code files in configurable batches, identifying functions, classes, imports, and dependencies.

nodes.name: architecture-analyzer.md
nodes.summary: Identifies architectural layers, patterns, and component relationships across the analyzed codebase to build a high-level structural map.

nodes.name: tour-builder.md
nodes.summary: Creates pedagogical learning tours that guide users through a codebase in a logical, progressive order for effective understanding.

nodes.name: domain-analyzer.md
nodes.summary: Extracts business domain concepts and terminology from the codebase to enrich the knowledge graph with domain-specific context.

nodes.name: assemble-reviewer.md
nodes.summary: Validates the merged knowledge graph output from all agents, checking for consistency and completeness before final review.

nodes.name: graph-reviewer.md
nodes.summary: Performs final QA validation on the completed knowledge graph, verifying structural integrity, edge correctness, and overall quality.

nodes.name: knowledge-graph-guide.md
nodes.summary: Provides help and documentation for navigating and understanding the generated knowledge graph and its interactive dashboard.

nodes.name: python.md
nodes.summary: Defines Python-specific analysis patterns including module structure, decorators, type hints, and common idioms for the file analyzer.

nodes.name: javascript.md
nodes.summary: Defines JavaScript-specific analysis patterns including ES modules, CommonJS, async patterns, and DOM interactions.

nodes.name: typescript.md
nodes.summary: Defines TypeScript-specific analysis patterns including type system, interfaces, generics, and declaration files.

nodes.name: rust.md
nodes.summary: Defines Rust-specific analysis patterns including ownership, traits, lifetimes, and module system conventions.

nodes.name: go.md
nodes.summary: Defines Go-specific analysis patterns including goroutines, interfaces, package structure, and error handling idioms.

nodes.name: java.md
nodes.summary: Defines Java-specific analysis patterns including class hierarchies, annotations, generics, and build system conventions.

nodes.name: csharp.md
nodes.summary: Defines C#-specific analysis patterns including namespaces, LINQ, async/await, and .NET project structure.

nodes.name: ruby.md
nodes.summary: Defines Ruby-specific analysis patterns including blocks, mixins, metaprogramming, and gem conventions.

nodes.name: php.md
nodes.summary: Defines PHP-specific analysis patterns including namespaces, traits, Composer autoloading, and PSR conventions.

nodes.name: cpp.md
nodes.summary: Defines C++-specific analysis patterns including templates, RAII, header/source separation, and STL usage.

nodes.name: swift.md
nodes.summary: Defines Swift-specific analysis patterns including protocols, optionals, value types, and SwiftUI/UIKit conventions.

nodes.name: kotlin.md
nodes.summary: Defines Kotlin-specific analysis patterns including coroutines, data classes, extension functions, and Android conventions.

nodes.name: sql.md
nodes.summary: Defines SQL-specific analysis patterns including DDL/DML statements, joins, stored procedures, and migration files.

nodes.name: graphql.md
nodes.summary: Defines GraphQL-specific analysis patterns including schema definitions, resolvers, queries, mutations, and subscriptions.

nodes.name: json.md
nodes.summary: Defines JSON-specific analysis patterns including configuration files, package manifests, and schema validation.

nodes.name: yaml.md
nodes.summary: Defines YAML-specific analysis patterns including CI/CD configs, Kubernetes manifests, and anchors/aliases.

nodes.name: dockerfile.md
nodes.summary: Defines Dockerfile-specific analysis patterns including multi-stage builds, layer optimization, and base image conventions.

nodes.name: html.md
nodes.summary: Defines HTML-specific analysis patterns including semantic elements, accessibility attributes, and template syntax.

nodes.name: css.md
nodes.summary: Defines CSS-specific analysis patterns including selectors, custom properties, media queries, and preprocessor conventions.

nodes.name: shell.md
nodes.summary: Defines shell script-specific analysis patterns including bash/zsh syntax, pipelines, and scripting conventions.

nodes.name: markdown.md
nodes.summary: Defines Markdown-specific analysis patterns including heading structure, link references, and documentation conventions.

nodes.name: protobuf.md
nodes.summary: Defines Protocol Buffer-specific analysis patterns including message definitions, service declarations, and versioning.

nodes.name: terraform.md
nodes.summary: Defines Terraform-specific analysis patterns including resource blocks, modules, providers, and state management.

nodes.name: react.md
nodes.summary: Defines React-specific conventions including component patterns, hooks, JSX structure, and state management approaches.

nodes.name: vue.md
nodes.summary: Defines Vue-specific conventions including SFC structure, Composition API, reactivity system, and Vuex/Pinia patterns.

nodes.name: express.md
nodes.summary: Defines Express.js-specific conventions including middleware chains, route handling, and request/response patterns.

nodes.name: fastapi.md
nodes.summary: Defines FastAPI-specific conventions including path operations, Pydantic models, dependency injection, and async endpoints.

nodes.name: django.md
nodes.summary: Defines Django-specific conventions including MTV pattern, ORM models, URL routing, and admin configuration.

nodes.name: flask.md
nodes.summary: Defines Flask-specific conventions including blueprints, decorators, Jinja2 templates, and extension patterns.

nodes.name: nextjs.md
nodes.summary: Defines Next.js-specific conventions including App Router, server components, API routes, and SSR/SSG strategies.

nodes.name: spring.md
nodes.summary: Defines Spring-specific conventions including dependency injection, annotations, MVC controllers, and Bean lifecycle.

nodes.name: rails.md
nodes.summary: Defines Ruby on Rails-specific conventions including MVC structure, ActiveRecord, migrations, and convention-over-configuration.

nodes.name: gin.md
nodes.summary: Defines Gin-specific conventions including router groups, middleware, context handling, and JSON binding patterns.

nodes.name: Kurs-Modus
nodes.summary: HTML course generation pipeline that produces multi-level interactive courses with audience segmentation, Energiekonzern design system, and L0-L3 depth levels.

nodes.name: Verstehen-Modus
nodes.summary: Knowledge graph generation pipeline that orchestrates specialized agents to analyze codebases and produce interactive knowledge graph dashboards.

nodes.name: Kombiniert-Modus
nodes.summary: Combined mode that runs both Kurs and Verstehen pipelines together, producing both HTML courses and knowledge graph dashboards in a single execution.

nodes.name: Level System (L0-L3)
nodes.summary: Four-tier depth system where L0 provides a high-level overview and L1-L3 offer progressively deeper technical detail, each generated as linked HTML files.

nodes.name: Helpfulness Scoring (HS 1-10)
nodes.summary: Scoring system from 1 to 10 that rates the pedagogical helpfulness of generated content, ensuring quality and relevance for the target audience.

nodes.name: Orchestrator
nodes.summary: Central coordination logic in skill.md that manages phase sequencing, mode selection, agent dispatch, and output assembly across the entire pipeline.

nodes.name: Design System (Energiekonzern)
nodes.summary: Visual identity system using Tiefenblau and Impuls-Orange color scheme, consistent typography, and responsive layout for all generated HTML outputs.

nodes.name: Zielgruppen (Audience Segmentation)
nodes.summary: Three target audience segments -- Anwender (users), Entwickler (developers), and Entscheider (decision-makers) -- each receiving tailored content and depth.

nodes.name: Knowledge Graph Schema
nodes.summary: Formal definition of node types, edge types, layer structure, and tour format that constitutes the output schema for the Verstehen pipeline.

nodes.name: Parallelisierung (Parallel Strategy)
nodes.summary: Strategy for dispatching multiple subagents in parallel to analyze different parts of a codebase simultaneously, improving throughput and efficiency.

layers.name: Agents
layers.description: Specialized analysis agents for the Verstehen pipeline

tour.title: Skill Overview
tour.description: Start with the master document to understand the three operating modes and overall architecture of the Learning Skill.

tour.title: The Three Modes
tour.description: Learn about Kurs (course generation), Verstehen (knowledge graph generation), and Kombiniert (combined) modes that form the core operating paradigm.

tour.title: The Agent Pipeline
tour.description: Discovery and analysis agents that scan codebases, detect languages and frameworks, and extract structural information from files.

tour.title: Architecture & Tours
tour.description: How architectural layers and patterns are identified, and how pedagogical learning paths are constructed from the analysis results.

tour.title: Quality Assurance
tour.description: Validation and review agents that ensure the merged knowledge graph is consistent, complete, and meets quality standards.

tour.title: Language Intelligence
tour.description: How 23 language-specific analysis patterns provide targeted extraction rules for functions, classes, imports, and idioms.

tour.title: Framework Patterns
tour.description: How 10 framework-specific convention files extend the analysis with knowledge of MVC patterns, component structures, and routing.

tour.title: The Course System
tour.description: How HTML courses are generated with L0-L3 depth levels, HS 1-10 quality scoring, and the Energiekonzern visual identity system.
